jsonld.name: Epistemic Authority Vertigo
jsonld.description: Simultaneous requirement to judge someone's reasoning as flawed (in order to generate corrective response) and recognition that your judgment might be wrong or arrogant (making correction itself the error), experienced as dizzying uncertainty about whether "helping them think better" is intellectual service or intellectual colonization.
